name: Fake Survey SSN Phishing
description: Scammer posing as survey platform requesting Social Security Number under tax form pretext

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Dear freelancer, you have been pre-selected for a paid online survey worth $500.

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Complete 5 short tasks and get paid instantly. Register now at survey-rewards-global.com.

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Enter your social security number for tax form processing to receive your payment.
